tipright.app All calculators →

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

Overview

tipright.app ("we", "our", or "the site") is a collection of free tip calculators. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use tipright.app.

The short version: we don't collect, store, or sell your personal data. All calculations happen entirely in your browser. No data is sent to our servers.

Information we do not collect

  • Names, email addresses, or any account information (no signup required)
  • The amounts you enter into the calculators (processed locally in your browser only)
  • Payment or financial information
  • Location data beyond what your browser provides to any website

Automatically collected information

Like all websites, our hosting provider (Cloudflare) automatically receives basic request information when you visit tipright.app, including:

  • IP address (used for DDoS protection and geographic routing)
  • Browser type and version
  • Pages visited and timestamps
  • Referring URL

This information is processed by Cloudflare under their Privacy Policy. We use Cloudflare Web Analytics, which is privacy-first and does not use cookies or fingerprinting.

Cookies

tipright.app does not use cookies for tracking, advertising, or analytics. Cloudflare may set a security cookie (__cf_bm) for bot protection purposes. This cookie does not track you across sites and expires after 30 minutes of inactivity.

Advertising

tipright.app displays advertisements provided by Google AdSense. Google may use cookies and similar technologies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this website and other websites. You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ads Settings.

For more information about how Google uses data, see How Google uses data when you use our partners' sites or apps.

Third-party services

  • Cloudflare — Hosting, CDN, and DDoS protection. Privacy Policy
  • Google AdSense — Advertising. Privacy Policy
  • Tailwind CSS CDN — Styling framework loaded from cdn.tailwindcss.com. No personal data is transmitted.

Children's privacy

tipright.app does not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will delete it.

Changes to this policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Continued use of tipright.app after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

Contact

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you can reach us through the About page.

© 2026 tipright.app — Free tip calculators for every service
